calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:39am and concluding at 9:58am.

Plaintiff United Litigation Discovery, Inc. appearing represented by Brent Basilico, Esq.
Defendant Guess & Co. Corporation not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff MORGAN CAPARETS and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff United Litigation Discovery, Inc., and against Defendant Guess & Co. Corporation, as follows:

Damages: $44,789.91
Prejudgment Interest: $8,711.70
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $576.25
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $54,077.86

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
